scripts.db:test:wait: bash -lc 'for i in $(seq 1 40); do if docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml exec -T postgres-test pg_isready -U postgres -d ucf_match_test >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; sleep 1; done; echo "Test DB did not become ready in time."; exit 1'
scripts.test:critical:db:prepare: bash -lc 'DEFAULT_TEST_DATABASE_URL="postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:54329/ucf_match_test?schema=public"; export TEST_DATABASE_URL="${TEST_DATABASE_URL:-$DEFAULT_TEST_DATABASE_URL}"; DATABASE_URL="$TEST_DATABASE_URL" npx prisma migrate deploy'
scripts.test:gate: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; npm run test:fast; npm run test:critical:db:e2e'
scripts.test:gate:ci: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; npm run test:fast; npm run test:critical:db:prepare; npm run test:critical:db'
